questions.question_text_full:
Select the sentence which gives the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom.
Bite the bullet

options.text: The children played in the park on a sunny day.
Despite the pain, Sarah decided to go ahead with the surgery.
The chef prepared a delicious meal for the guests.
Jack and Jill went up the hill to fetch a pail of water.

questions.correct_option_text: Despite the pain, Sarah decided to go ahead with the surgery.

questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that arranges the given words to form a grammatically correct and meaningful sentence.
The students eagerly their awaited results.

options.text: The students their eagerly awaited results.
The awaited eagerly results their students.
Eagerly awaited the students their results.
The students eagerly awaited their results.

questions.correct_option_text: The students eagerly awaited their results.

Robin watched as the smoke ________ steadily from the chimney.
